meta_description: eMachineShop offers CNC laser cutting technology services for cutting, marking, or engraving metal and non-metal materials into custom shapes with precision.

sections.heading: CNC Laser Cutting And The Technology Behind It
sections.text: CNC Laser Cutting And The Technology Behind It by Darko | Jun 12, 2022 « Back to all posts What is CNC Laser Cutting ? CNC laser cutting technology is computer numerical control (CNC) equipment capable of cutting holes and intricate shapes with outstanding precision. Laser cutting is a technology designed to produce metal parts from sheet metal through the use of a focused, high-powered laser beam, which vaporizes, melts, burns, or removes material by essentially blowing it away by a jet of gas. This process results in an edge with a high-quality surface finish. This technology, which was initially used for drilling holes into diamond dies, emerged in 1965 and has since been adapted for ind...
